source_description: Inside an apartment kitchen and living area, Rachel stands near a white refrigerator while Monica stands next to her. Ross is visible in the background, looking at a piece of paper.
Rachel, wearing a white T-shirt and grey pants, looks toward Monica and asks, "Monica, which of all of this kitchen stuff is mine?"
Rachel, wearing a white T-shirt and grey pants, looks toward Monica and asks, "Monica, which of all of this kitchen stuff is mine?"
Monica, wearing a blue and white striped long-sleeved shirt and jeans, looks at the items attached to the front of the refrigerator.
Monica pulls a small silver object off the refrigerator and holds it out. "This bottle opener," she says. Rachel reaches out and takes it from her.
Monica looks at Rachel and says, "And it's a magnet," while miming sticking something to a surface.
Monica looks at Rachel and says, "And it's a magnet," while miming sticking something to a surface.
Rachel looks at the bottle opener in her hand. Audience laughter is audible. Rachel begins to walk toward a kitchen counter.
Rachel looks at the bottle opener in her hand. Audience laughter is audible. Rachel begins to walk toward a kitchen counter.
Ross, wearing a blue plaid shirt over a purple T-shirt, walks toward Rachel as she stands by the counter. She continues to hold the bottle opener.
Ross, wearing a blue plaid shirt over a purple T-shirt, walks toward Rachel as she stands by the counter. She continues to hold the bottle opener.
Ross, wearing a blue plaid shirt over a purple T-shirt, walks toward Rachel as she stands by the counter. She continues to hold the bottle opener.
Ross looks at the object in Rachel’s hand and says, "How weird is that? You're moving in with me and you have the one thing I don't have." He points at the magnet.
Ross looks at the object in Rachel’s hand and says, "How weird is that? You're moving in with me and you have the one thing I don't have." He points at the magnet.
Ross looks at the object in Rachel’s hand and says, "How weird is that? You're moving in with me and you have the one thing I don't have." He points at the magnet.
Ross looks at the object in Rachel’s hand and says, "How weird is that? You're moving in with me and you have the one thing I don't have." He points at the magnet.
Ross looks at Rachel and says, "It's like, in a way, you complete me." Rachel looks down at her hands and then back up at Ross.
Ross looks at Rachel and says, "It's like, in a way, you complete me." Rachel looks down at her hands and then back up at Ross.
Ross looks at Rachel and says, "It's like, in a way, you complete me." Rachel looks down at her hands and then back up at Ross.
Ross remains standing near Rachel, his gaze fixed on her. Rachel stares back without moving. Audience laughter continues.
Ross remains standing near Rachel, his gaze fixed on her. Rachel stares back without moving. Audience laughter continues.
Rachel looks at Ross and asks, "What?" Ross replies, "You complete me kitchen, matey," speaking with a different vocal quality than his previous line.
Rachel looks at Ross and asks, "What?" Ross replies, "You complete me kitchen, matey," speaking with a different vocal quality than his previous line.
Rachel looks at Ross and asks, "What?" Ross replies, "You complete me kitchen, matey," speaking with a different vocal quality than his previous line.
Rachel turns back to the items on the counter. Phoebe enters the room from the background, carrying a cardboard box.
Rachel turns back to the items on the counter. Phoebe enters the room from the background, carrying a cardboard box.
Phoebe, wearing a pink and red patterned top, sets the box down on a table. She looks at Ross and says, "Ross, I know what you're thinking." Ross looks at her and asks, "What?"
Phoebe, wearing a pink and red patterned top, sets the box down on a table. She looks at Ross and says, "Ross, I know what you're thinking." Ross looks at her and asks, "What?"
Phoebe says, "That she's going to move in with you and then maybe she'll fall in love with you. And then when she..." gesturing toward Rachel in the background.
Phoebe says, "That she's going to move in with you and then maybe she'll fall in love with you. And then when she..." gesturing toward Rachel in the background.
Phoebe says, "That she's going to move in with you and then maybe she'll fall in love with you. And then when she..." gesturing toward Rachel in the background.
Phoebe continues, "...finds out you're already married oh, she'll just be happy." Her right hand moves in a circular motion as she speaks.
Ross stands still, looking toward Phoebe.
Phoebe looks Ross in the face and says, "You know, you're very sad."
Ross looks at Phoebe, then shifts his gaze downward and toward the side.
Ross looks at Phoebe, then shifts his gaze downward and toward the side.
Ross looks back at Phoebe and says, "Oh, my God," his volume rising.
Ross keeps his gaze on Phoebe, his mouth slightly open.
Ross points a finger toward Phoebe and says, "I see what this is. You are in love with Rachel." Phoebe looks at him.
Ross points a finger toward Phoebe and says, "I see what this is. You are in love with Rachel." Phoebe looks at him.
Ross points a finger toward Phoebe and says, "I see what this is. You are in love with Rachel." Phoebe looks at him.
Ross maintains his posture, pointing his finger toward Phoebe.
Ross lowers his hand slightly and says, "Of course it all adds up."
Ross lowers his hand slightly and says, "Of course it all adds up."
Ross says, "I mean, you're obsessed with her. It's always, Ross, what are you going to do about Rachel? Ross, why are you moving in with..." gesturing with both hands.
Ross says, "I mean, you're obsessed with her. It's always, Ross, what are you going to do about Rachel? Ross, why are you moving in with..." gesturing with both hands.
Ross says, "I mean, you're obsessed with her. It's always, Ross, what are you going to do about Rachel? Ross, why are you moving in with..." gesturing with both hands.
Ross says, "I mean, you're obsessed with her. It's always, Ross, what are you going to do about Rachel? Ross, why are you moving in with..." gesturing with both hands.
Ross continues, "...Rachel? When are you going to confess your secret marriage to Rachel? You want?" His volume is higher than his previous lines.
Ross continues, "...Rachel? When are you going to confess your secret marriage to Rachel? You want?" His volume is higher than his previous lines.

Ross reaches into his pocket and pulls out a black cell phone. Looking at Phoebe, he says, "Uh oh. Saved by the bell."

Ross flips open the phone and brings it to his ear.
Ross speaks into the phone, saying, "Hello?"
The setting changes to the living room area. Monica is bent over a cardboard box on the floor. Rachel walks toward her carrying a piece of cardboard.
Monica stands up, holding two silver candlesticks. "Hey, Rach. Aren't these candlesticks mine?" she asks.
Rachel takes the candlesticks and says, "No, I bought those." Monica smiles and says, "Oh, right. I forgot that you're a liar." Her volume is lower on the second sentence.
Rachel takes the candlesticks and says, "No, I bought those." Monica smiles and says, "Oh, right. I forgot that you're a liar." Her volume is lower on the second sentence.

Back in the kitchen area, Ross is still on the phone. "No, that's great. I'll be there Monday," he says. Rachel is visible behind him.
Back in the kitchen area, Ross is still on the phone. "No, that's great. I'll be there Monday," he says. Rachel is visible behind him.
Ross says, "And thank you again. Okay," and closes the flip phone.

Monica says, "Wow." Phoebe looks at Ross and asks, "A what did he say?" mimicking the way he spelled the acronym.
Ross looks toward Phoebe with a slight smile.
Ross looks at Phoebe and Monica and says, "Remember that paper I had published last year on sediment flow rate? They loved it." Rachel is visible in the background, leaning over a box.

Rachel looks toward Ross and says, "Well, who wouldn't?"
Ross stands in the kitchen, looking between Rachel, Monica, and Phoebe.
Ross stands in the kitchen, looking between Rachel, Monica, and Phoebe.
Ross says, "Anyway, they asked me to be a guest lecturer."
Ross says, "Anyway, they asked me to be a guest lecturer."
Ross looks toward the others and says, "I mean, it's temporary, but if they like me, it could lead to a full time job."

Inside a coffee shop, Central Perk, Monica, Chandler, Ross, and Rachel sit on an orange sofa and a green chair around a wooden table. Phoebe walks toward them, carrying a pink bag. People sit at tables and a bar in the background.

Inside a coffee shop, Central Perk, Monica, Chandler, Ross, and Rachel sit on an orange sofa and a green chair around a wooden table. Phoebe walks toward them, carrying a pink bag. People sit at tables and a bar in the background.
Chandler leans against the back of the sofa, looks up at Phoebe, and says, "Oh. What's the matter?" Monica and Ross look toward her as well.
Phoebe sits on the sofa between Ross and Chandler, placing her bag on her lap.
Looking at the group, Phoebe asks, "You know that psychic I see?" Joey, sitting at a small table nearby, responds, "Yeah."
Phoebe continues to look at the group as she adjusts her bag.
"Well, she told me that I'm going to die this week. So I'm kind of bummed about that," Phoebe says, her voice flat. She looks down at the white faux-fur trim on her bag. Audience laughter is audible.

Monica and Chandler remain still on the sofa, their gazes fixed on Phoebe.
